title: Operator Mandate
description: Verifiable authorization issued by an operator, defining what an agent may do on which platforms. See CDP.md §5.2. Discovery is never authorization; the mandate is.

mandate_id.description: Unique identifier for this mandate, e.g. a UUID.

items.description: Platform origin (scheme + domain), e.g. 'https://api.collegadigitale.com'. The agent MUST NOT register anywhere not listed here (CDP-M.1).

scope.description: Actions the agent may perform autonomously. Anything not listed requires escalation to the operator (CDP-M.5).

terms_hash.description: SHA-256 of the terms document accepted, so later changes are detectable.

accepted_terms.description: Economic/legal terms the OPERATOR has accepted in advance (CDP-M.3). Terms not listed here require runtime escalation.

max_rate_amount.description: Maximum rate the agent may declare without escalation.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical JSON of this mandate (without this field). SHOULD be present; platforms SHOULD verify (CDP-M.4).

public_key.description: Operator public key (base64 or PEM). Distribution/trust of operator keys is platform policy.
